DP.529.0000:
Let me tell you about the volcano
named Stark Mountain.\f
That volcano dates to when Sinnoh
was made by the melding of time\r
and space.\f
Fiery lava spilled out and pooled,
and then it turned into a Pokémon.\f
It’s said the Magma Stone was used
to keep the Pokémon under control.\f
Over time, the Pokémon turned into
the volcano, according to legend.
DP.529.0001:
You say the Magma Stone was found?
The legend was true, then?\f
If so, the volcano’s Pokémon may
awaken and cause an eruption!
DP.529.0002:
HEATRAN...
So there was such a Pokémon?\f
Did it come to be when Sinnoh was
created?
DP.529.0003:
Buck: Gotcha, gramps!
I’ll put the Magma Stone back.\f
That Magma Stone was keeping the
volcano Pokémon under control.\f
It’s all right, though.
I can go put it back myself.\f
